property_evaluation_rule: Evaluate rho and mu from the explicit case-family material branch at segment state
target_use: Primary hydraulic state and friction-fit coordinate
required_repo_inputs: mdot or U; rho(T); mu(T); D_h
safe_domain: All current families as a state variable
warning: Do not mix Jin Kirst and validation properties inside one hidden default

property_evaluation_rule: Evaluate mu cp and k from the same local state and material branch
target_use: Primary thermal state and entry coordinate
safe_domain: All current families as a state variable
warning: Do not fix Pr independently from the property model

property_evaluation_rule: Use the same local Re and Pr definitions as the active segment state
characteristic_length: Use the same D_h embedded in Re
safe_domain: All current families as a diagnostic
warning: Useful but secondary to the explicit Re and Pr fields

property_evaluation_rule: Use local Re and Pr with explicit local distance from the last reset or inlet
characteristic_length: Hydraulic diameter D_h and local development length x
required_repo_inputs: Re; Pr; D_h; branchwise x from reset or inlet
warning: A Graetz threshold is a diagnostic not a closure law

formula: Gr = g * beta * DeltaT * D_h^3 / nu^2
property_evaluation_rule: Use local or segmentwise property evaluation consistent with the chosen material branch
warning: Choice of DeltaT reference must be stated explicitly

property_evaluation_rule: Use the same Gr and Pr definitions used elsewhere in the same segment
safe_domain: Mostly for natural-convection interpretation or cross-checks
warning: Do not import cavity-based Nu(Ra Pr) laws directly into pipe closures without justification

property_evaluation_rule: Use the same local Re and Gr definitions for the segment
characteristic_length: Uses D_h through Re and Gr
target_use: Flag buoyancy influence on forced-convection assumptions
warning: Use as a gate before promoting a new Nu closure not as an automatic switch

property_evaluation_rule: Use the same Re and convention separation throughout the workflow
characteristic_length: Hydraulic diameter D_h for pressure-drop use
required_repo_inputs: Re; wall shear comparison if needed
warning: A factor-of-four mistake against Reis-style Fanning quantities is easy to make

property_evaluation_rule: Evaluate h only from admitted or explicitly labeled support-gated thermal surfaces and use local k from the chosen material branch
target_use: Dimensionless thermal-closure output and comparison quantity
required_repo_inputs: HTC or direct h; D_h; k(T)
safe_domain: Only on admitted direct or support-gated branches
warning: Do not back-compute Nu from unsupported branches and call it defended

formula: delta_t / delta_h or analogous thermal-to-hydrodynamic boundary-layer ratio
property_evaluation_rule: Use the same near-wall profile definitions for both thermal and hydraulic thicknesses
required_repo_inputs: retained-time near-wall velocity and temperature profiles
safe_domain: Contextual only with current repo artifacts
warning: Current repo support is not yet strong enough to promote this as a fitting coordinate
